result.text: {"answer_label":"drop-exit-code","answer":"Drop it before the stable schema freeze. It does not represent an independently supplied process result and risks implying a meaningful execution signal.","contradiction_caught":null,"contradiction_explanation":"","minority_finding":"Keeping it could reserve a familiar field for future graders, but its current hardcoded values would mislead consumers.","evidence":["For scored results, exit_code is hardcoded to 0; otherwise it is null, regardless of what ran.","No shipped grader supplies an independent process exit through this field, and pre-freeze removal needs no compatibility handling."]}
